title: Whole community must step up to care for homeless individuals (Your Letters)
summary: Opinion letter advocating for inclusive community planning regarding homeless services on Dickerson Street. Writer criticizes lack of neighborhood consultation during six-month planning process for a drop-in center near the Rescue Mission and calls for countywide responsibility-sharing for homeless care rather than displacement strategies.

political_signal.description: West Onondaga Street residents and business owners demanding meaningful consultation on homeless services planning; criticism of six-month planning process without neighborhood input.

processing_notes: Letter references prior letter from Mike Melara (Catholic Charities) dated July 31, 2025 regarding Dickerson Street fencing proposal
Core issue: lack of community engagement in early planning stages for drop-in center near Rescue Mission
Writer identifies as commercial building owner, suggesting business community perspective
Broader advocacy for countywide approach to homelessness rather than localized displacement
